title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.234 - Ovarian Cancer Awareness Month, month of September
text:
9.234.  Ovarian Cancer Awareness Month, month of September. — The month of September every year shall be designated as "Ovarian Cancer Awareness Month" in Missouri.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate activities and events to increase awareness of ovarian cancer and the importance of early detection and treatment in saving lives.
(L. 2025 S.B. 348)
